form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 1800m at this track beaten 5.5 m by Rocknroll Yankee (2:13.30) in NR 44 to 49 on March 28 at $17. Two runs back 2nd (Fr3) over 1800m after showing early speed at this track, at the bell was 3rd-6.6 beaten 7 m by Hy Filante (2:10.50) in NR 41 to 45 on March 24 at $8. Place best.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Balladoro at this track over 1800m in a NR up to 49 on March 28 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Star Of Willoughby at Victor Harbor over 1660m in a NR up to 43 on April 5 at $5.30. Major player aided by a low draw.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 2230m at this track was 2nd-2.2 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Whata Optimist (2:45.10) in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $11.10. Two runs back tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 m when quickly away, (Fr1) held up early, at Port Pirie (2:29.20) beating Lower Manhattan in NR 41 to 46 on March 31 at $2.80 at the bell was 3rd-4.2. Go well.

form.formComment: Solid performance when a close second after a quick start, behind Golden Jaylet at this track over 1800m in a NR up to 43 on March 28 at $1.45.
